claims.claim: legacy direct requestはworking_directoryのnilを保持したままdirect/sync/offへだけ正規化され、v1/v2混在はRUN_CHECK_INVOCATION_INVALIDで拒否される。
24通りのinvocation/cache/dispatch matrixは18通りを受理し、directかつcache off以外の6通りだけをRUN_CHECK_CACHE_NOT_ALLOWEDで拒否する。
profileDigest/selectionDigestはlowercase ASCII SHA-256だけを受理し、canonical plan/request digestはpolicy、argument順、environment値、working_directoryのnil/実値を束縛する。

residual_risks: MCP v2のclosed JSON unionとunknown/extra field拒否はACE-034 runtime/MCP統合の所有であり、本compiler seamはtyped Requestでmixed inputを明示拒否するまでに留めた。
cache lookup、selection再照合、managed admissionは本taskのnon-goalであり、compilerはimmutable planとdigestだけを供給する。

placeholders.result_digest: final diff SHA-256 recorded in report.result_digest
placeholders.evidence_ref: bounded executor receipt recorded in report.evidence
placeholders.evidence_digest: SHA-256 recorded for each evidence item
placeholders.observed_at: UTC timestamp recorded for each evidence item
placeholders.changed_paths: repo-relative owned paths recorded in report.changed_paths
placeholders.executor_handle: correlated native agent path preserved in report.executor_handle
